caption:
The new season doesn't arrive — it unfolds, slowly, like the first linen you reach for when the warmth finally returns.

Diega SS26 has landed at Blink, and it feels exactly like that moment when the island exhales and says: *yes, now.* Effortless silhouettes, sun-softened palettes, fabrics that move the way a good day should. This is the collection that makes you want to book the ferry, open the shutters, and stay a little longer.

Clothing: @diega_paris

Only at Blink
